title: A Psalm of David, when he fled from the presence of his son Absalom.

verses.t: O Lord, why are they that afflict me multiplied? many rise up against me.
Many say concerning my soul, There is no deliverance for him in his God.
But thou, O Lord, art my helper: my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.
I cried to the Lord with my voice, and he heard me out of his holy mountain.
I lay down and slept; I awaked; for the Lord will help me.
I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people, who beset me round about.
Arise, O Lord; deliver me, my God: for thou hast smitten all who were without cause mine enemies; thou hast broken the teeth of sinners.
Deliverance is the Lord's, and thy blessing is upon thy people.
